# setTimerNextFireTime(_:fireTime:)

**Instance Method**

Sets the time on the timebase’s timeline at which the timer should fire next.

## Declaration

```swift
func setTimerNextFireTime(_ timer: Timer, fireTime: CMTime) throws
```

## Setting Timers

- **setTimerNextFireTime(_:fireTime:)**: Sets the time on the timebase’s timeline at which the timer dispatch source should fire next.
- **setTimerToFireImmediately(_:)**: Sets the timer to fire immediately once, overriding any previous calls.
- **setTimerToFireImmediately(_:)**: Sets the timer dispatch source to fire immediately once, overriding any previous calls.
